channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: AAP Rebel's Secret Meeting with Arvind Kejriwal: Key Details Revealed
item.description: A dramatic twist in the ongoing political drama within the Aam Aadmi Party (AAP) has emerged. The rebel leader of AAP, who has been making waves within the party, reportedly met with party chief Arvin...

item.title: Mini Crossword and Superquiz Puzzles for Sunday, April 26
item.description: The Age presents its Superquiz for Sunday, April 26, inviting readers to engage in its range of puzzles, including the Mini Crossword and Target Time. The Mini Crossword is a compact, ten-clue puzzle ...

item.title: Global oil demand faces sharp declines amid prolonged Hormuz supply disruption
item.description: The ongoing closure of the Strait of Hormuz is creating a severe disruption in global oil supply, with at least one billion barrels lost—more than double the emergency inventories released earlier thi...

item.title: Cohere and Aleph Alpha announce merger to expand enterprise AI presence across North America and Europe
item.description: Cohere, a Canadian enterprise AI company, has announced plans to merge with German AI startup Aleph Alpha in a deal that aims to strengthen their competitive position in the global artificial intellig...

item.title: Remulla confirms asset freeze tied to Romualdez in ongoing flood control investigation
item.description: Kinumpirma ni Justice Secretary Boying Remulla na may ipinalabas na freeze order laban kay Martin Romualdez kaugnay ng isang imbestigasyon sa umano’y iregularidad sa mga proyektong flood control. Ang ...

item.title: Funeral planned for seven KZN family members killed after abduction
item.description: A tragic mass funeral will take place this Sunday for seven members of the Monswamy family from KwaZulu-Natal, who were brutally abducted and murdered earlier this week. The victims, including Alan an...

item.title: Government clears policy for 5G test trials in Gilgit-Baltistan with four operators set to participate
item.description: The federal government has moved forward with plans to introduce 5G services in Gilgit-Baltistan (GB), as the GB Council chaired by Prime Minister Shehbaz Sharif has approved policy directives for ini...

item.title: University Student Brutally Injured During Phone Robbery Attack in Bauchi
item.description: One serious incident don happen for Gadau town in Bauchi State, where suspected phone snatchers attack one 200-level student of Sa’adu Zungur University (SAZU), Maryam Yakeem. According to eyewitness ...

item.title: Electric utes and towing: How Australians can safely hitch up a caravan or trailer in 2026
item.description: Australians have long relied on turbo‑diesel dual‑cab utes and large SUVs to tow heavy loads, from tool trailers and caravans to boats, but the rise of battery electric vehicles is starting to change ...

item.title: Why Some People Over 80 Have Memory Like Those Half Their Age
item.description: A group of individuals known as 'SuperAgers'—adults over 80 with memory comparable to people decades younger—has challenged conventional wisdom about aging. Researchers at Northwestern Medicine have s...

item.title: Obasanjo Leads Opposition Leaders’ Summit in Ibadan Amid Unity Talks and Disruption Claims
item.description: Former President Olusegun Obasanjo dey chair one major national summit wey gather leaders of opposition political parties for Ibadan, Oyo State. The event, wey Governor Seyi Makinde host for Governmen...

item.title: AI Is Reshaping Consulting Fees but Not Replacing Human Judgment
item.description: Artificial intelligence is rapidly transforming the consulting industry, not by eliminating its core value, but by significantly boosting productivity and challenging long-standing pricing models. The...

item.title: Cape Enrage Closure Raises Economic and Community Concerns in Albert County
item.description: Residents and business owners in Albert County, New Brunswick, are voicing strong concerns following the closure of Cape Enrage, a well-known tourist destination along the Bay of Fundy. The site, reco...

item.title: Protests over electricity supply disrupt traffic at Diepkloof Hostel in Soweto
item.description: On Saturday, tensions escalated at the Diepkloof Hostel in Soweto as residents staged protests over ongoing electricity supply disruptions. Metro police (JMPD) reported that demonstrators blocked the ...

item.title: Luis Manzano celebrates birthday on Kapamilya Deal Or No Deal with special surprise from Peanut
item.description: Ipinakita sa isang episode ng “Kapamilya Deal Or No Deal” ang isang makabuluhang birthday moment para sa host na si Luis Manzano. Sa gitna ng programa, nakatanggap siya ng isang espesyal at emosyonal ...

item.title: Stock Market Gains as Intel Surges; Investors Optimistic About U.S.-Iran Peace Talks
item.description: On Friday, the S&P 500 and Nasdaq Composite closed at record highs, driven by Intel's impressive earnings results, which saw the chipmaker's shares soar by 23.6%. The positive market sentiment was fur...

item.title: Iranian military leaders warn of escalation if U.S. naval blockade around Iran persists
item.description: Iran’s armed‑forces leadership has issued a stern warning that continued U.S. naval blockade operations in the Persian Gulf and Strait of Hormuz could trigger a military response from Tehran. High‑lev...

item.title: Daniel MacPherson endured serious injuries preparing for Russell Crowe’s MMA film Beast
item.description: Australian actor Daniel MacPherson has revealed the intense physical toll of preparing for his lead role in Beast, an MMA-focused film co-written by Russell Crowe and directed by Tyler Atkins. MacPher...

item.title: Federal Court pauses deportation of Humboldt Broncos crash driver pending legal review
item.description: A Federal Court judge has granted a temporary stay of deportation for Jaskirat Singh Sidhu, the truck driver responsible for the 2018 Humboldt Broncos bus crash, preventing his removal from Canada whi...

item.title: Government pledges firm action against xenophobic violence following diplomatic tensions with Ghana
item.description: South African authorities have committed to taking decisive action against xenophobic attacks targeting foreign nationals, particularly Ghanaians, following diplomatic concerns raised by Ghana. The mo...
